# Class: PageResult

Defined in: [core/specification/website/result.ts:71](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/website/result.ts#L71)

Result from a rendered `.visit()` action — the page as a browser saw it.

- [`BaseResult`](BaseResult.md)

### console

#### Get Signature

```ts
get console(): TextAccessor;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/website/result.ts:100](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/website/result.ts#L100)

The browser console as a stream — one message per line, prefixed by
its type — same shape as `stdout` on a cli result. Assert emptiness
with `toBeEmpty()`, or snapshot with `toMatch('home.console.txt')`.

##### Returns

[`TextAccessor`](TextAccessor.md)

***

### errors

#### Get Signature

```ts
get errors(): TextAccessor;
```

Defined in: [core/specification/website/result.ts:110](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/website/result.ts#L110)

Console messages of type `error` only — the stream you usually want
empty: `expect(result.errors).toBeEmpty()`. Same shape as `stderr` on
a cli result.

[`TextAccessor`](TextAccessor.md)

### head

#### Get Signature

Defined in: [core/specification/website/result.ts:123](https://github.com/jterrazz/package-test/blob/main/src/core/specification/website/result.ts#L123)

hreflang alternates, and named metas — for one golden per page:
